CustomField.description: Formula image field. Green flag = Issued (permit cleared). Red flag = Pending or Under Review (blocking). Yellow flag = Denied or Suspended (requires action). Blank = unknown status. In the nepa_required_permit__c related list on Scene 7-A, Issued + red for Pending renders the critical-path story (NPDES Issued = green; CWA 404 Pending = red) visually before the presenter narrates it. Also used in Scene 6-A (nepaPermitDependencies LWC context).
CustomField.formula: CASE(nepa_permit_status__c, "Issued", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Issued — Cleared", 16, 16), "Approved", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Approved — Cleared", 16, 16), "Pending", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Pending — Not Yet Issued", 16, 16), "Under Review", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Under Review — Not Yet Issued", 16, 16), "Denied", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "Denied — Requires Action", 16, 16), "Suspended", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "Suspended — Requires Action", 16, 16), IMAGE("/s.gif", "Unknown", 1, 1) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Green = Issued/Approved. Red = Pending or Under Review. Yellow = Denied/Suspended. Visible in related list — reads the permit status story before opening the record.
CustomField.label: Status Flag
